full_text:
Du Yuan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Yuan. Found Liu Bei’s wives but when he refused to let them go, Liao Hua killed him. Du Yuan is a fictional character. Du Yuan was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Du Yuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
